vocab.example: When I head to the beach, I prefer to travel light, carrying nothing but the bare essentials like sunblock and a towel.

vocab.meaning: để phòng hờ (phòng khi cần đến)
vocab.example: Even for short city breaks, I often pack a portable umbrella just in case the weather takes a turn for the worse.

vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể tách rời
vocab.example: Carrying a high-quality camera is part and parcel of my hiking trips, as I love documenting the scenery.

vocab.meaning: ngay lập tức (sẵn sàng ứng phó)
vocab.example: I keep my business bag packed with chargers and documents so I can head to a meeting at a moment's notice.
When I go camping, the lion's share of my luggage is dedicated to survival gear and cooking equipment.

vocab.meaning: được trang bị sẵn sàng (đồ đạc/tâm thế)
vocab.example: For a skiing trip, you really need to be geared up with specialized thermal clothing to withstand the cold.

vocab.meaning: có sẵn trong tầm tay (tiện lợi)
vocab.example: I like to have my offline maps and translation apps at my fingertips when navigating a country where I don't speak the language.
My backpack is usually full of various odds and ends like safety pins, wet wipes, and spare batteries.
To avoid extra baggage fees, I try to cut down on the number of shoes I bring for city trips.

vocab.meaning: phù hợp với mục đích sử dụng
vocab.example: I make sure every item in my bag is fit for purpose; for instance, I only take heavy-duty boots for rocky terrains.
